solutions.solution: The pattern of the question is, F J L R U X with +3 +1 +2 +2 +1 +2. D G H J N P Q S with +3 +1 +2 +2 +1 +2. Clearly, option (d) is different from the others.
16 14 12 10 22 20 18 16 10 8 6 4 20 17 15 13 P N L J V T R P J H F D T Q O M with -2 -2 -2 -2 -2 -2 -2 -2 -2 -2 -2 -2 -3 -2 -2. Hence, except option (d) all are following same rule of gap.
5 8 7 3 C E F A M P O K S V U Q E H G C with +3 -1 -4 +2 +1 -5 +3 -1 +4 +3 -1 -4. Clearly, option (b) is different from other three.
18 11 4 21 14 7 13 20 6 19 12 5 R K D U N G M T F S L E with +7 -7 +17 -7 -7 +6 +7 -14 +13 -7 -7. From above, it is clear that MTF is different from all others.
In all other groups, first letter is 3 steps ahead of the second and third letters is 4 steps ahead of the first.
In all other groups, the third and first letters are in alphabetical order.
In all other groups, the second and first letters are three steps ahead of third and second letters, respectively.
Except (d), all three are same because in those three options first, fourth, second and third are opposite letters.
G M 15 18 22 3 5 8 12 O R Y C E H L with +2 +3 +4 +2 +3 +4. 3 5 14 20 10 12 15 19 C E N T J L O S with +2 +9 +6 +2 +3 +4. From above, it is clear that word 'CENT' is different from all others.
Except 'PRU', all others having same gap but 'PRU' is not following the same rule.
2 5 7 11 14 16 23 26 2 10 12 14 4 7 9 B E G K N P W Z B J L N D G I with +3 +2 +4 +3 +2 +7 +3 +2 +2 +2 +3 +2 +3 +2. Therefore, GHJK is different from the other three.
In all other groups, there is a gap of one letter as in the alphabet between first and third letters.
Except option (d), sum of all other letters given is equal to 27. And given number represents the position of let letter.
Except option (d), all letters in pairs having difference of four.
Except option (d), all letters in options having same difference among them.
